input_intent: gNB-CU has to prepare and send F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST" message to the candidate gNB-DU and candidate gNB-DU has to respond with F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE" message and this message has to be handled on gNB-CU for Inter gNB DU LTM Handover

validation_policy.messages: Each message in the matched mapping rule must appear in Call_Flow. Additional messages in the template are not flagged.
validation_policy.information_elements: Each non-optional IE listed in the rule for a step must exist in Information_Elements and match the rule's ASN.1 structure. Additional IEs in the template are not flagged.
validation_policy.type_fields: Mapping 'type' entries are ASN.1 constructors and type references (structure), not concrete F1AP/RRC instance values.

llm_ambiguity_review.raw_response_preview: {"reviews":[{"id":"receiver_mismatch_1","verdict":"false_positive","reason":"Receiver 'candidate_gNB-DU' matches expected receiver for UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST."},{"id":"missing_ie_1_ltminformationsetup","verdict":"confirm","reason":"Required IE 'LTMInformation-Setup' is missing from Information_Elements and must be added."},{"id":"missing_ie_1_ltmconfigurationidmappinglist","verdict":"confirm","reason":"Required IE 'LTMConfigurationIDMappingList' is missing from Information_Elements and must be added."},{"id":"sender_mismatch_2","verdict":"false_positive","reason":"Sender 'candidate_gNB-DU' matches expected sender for UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE."},{"id":"missing_ie_2_ltmconfiguration","verdict":"confirm","reason":"Required IE 'LTMConfiguration' is missing from Information_Elements and must be added."}]}

suppressed.llm_reason: Receiver 'candidate_gNB-DU' matches expected receiver for UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST.
Sender 'candidate_gNB-DU' matches expected sender for UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE.
